title: Under the Starry Sky
overview: The debut feature from Franco-Senegalese filmmaker Dyana Gaye charts the interconnected destinies of three far-flung sojourners across three continents. A quiet drama, about the anxieties of negotiating journeying to foreign countries and making a place for oneself in the world.

trailers.title: Des étoiles, bande annonce Dyana Gaye
